---
title: "Archive"
subtitle: "Past projects, blog posts, and talks kept for reference."
body-classes: "ed-page"
listing:
  - id: archive-projects
    contents: projects/*/index.qmd
    type: default
    sort: "date desc"
    fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    page-size: 30
  - id: archive-blog
    contents: blog/*/index.qmd
    type: default
    sort: "date desc"
    fields: [image, date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    page-size: 30
  - id: archive-talks
    contents: talks/*/index.qmd
    type: default
    sort: "date desc"
    fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    page-size: 30
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
---

## Projects

::: {#archive-projects}
:::

## Blog

::: {#archive-blog}
:::

## Talks

::: {#archive-talks}
:::
